zh.lifeSummary: 當William de Etchingham於大約1242年出生在英國英格蘭素可艾欽加姆時，他的父親Simon Echyngham26歲，母親Paulina St Leger24歲。他去世於1294年5月11日在英國英格蘭素可迪胡爾斯特享年53歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭素可。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When William de Etchingham was born about 1242, in Etchingham, Sussex, England, United Kingdom, his father, Simon Echyngham, was 26 and his mother, Paulina St Leger, was 24. He died on 11 May 1294, in Ticehurst, Sussex, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 53, and was buried in Sussex, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William d’Etchingham est né environ 1242, à Etchingham, Sussex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Simon Echyngham, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Paulina St Leger, avait 24 ans. Il est décédé le 11 mai 1294, à Ticehurst, Sussex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 53 ans, et a été enterré à Sussex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als William de Etchingham um 1242 in Etchingham, Sussex, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Simon Echyngham 26 und seine Mutter Paulina St Leger 24. Er starb am 11. Mai 1294 im Alter von 53 Jahren in Ticehurst, Sussex, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Sussex, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William de Etchingham è nato il circa 1242 nel Etchingham, Sussex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Simon Echyngham, aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Paulina St Leger, aveva 24 anni. Morì il 11 maggio 1294, nel Ticehurst, Sussex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 53 anni, e fu sepolto a Sussex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ko.lifeSummary: William de Etchingham(이)가 대략 1242년 영국 잉글랜드 수세스 트친그함에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Simon Echyngham(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Paulina St Leger(은)는 24세였다. 그는 1294년 5월 11일 영국 잉글랜드 수세스 티스후르스트에서 53세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 수세스에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William de Etchingham родился около 1242 г. в местности эчингхам, суссекс, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Simon Echyngham было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Paulina St Leger, 24.
